---
title: "People"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: about.css
resources:
  - people.yml
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="about-hero" style="padding-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <p class="about-eyebrow">PEOPLE</p>
  <h1 class="about-title">The people behind<br/>the curriculum.</h1>
  <p class="about-tagline">Educators, researchers, and engineers across academia, industry, and the global TinyML community.</p>
</div>

<!-- All people are loaded from people.yml — edit that file to add/remove/update anyone. -->
<div id="people-container"></div>

<p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="contributors.html" class="cta-btn-secondary" style="font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;">
    View all contributors →
  </a>
</p>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/js-yaml@4/dist/js-yaml.min.js"></script>
<script>
(async () => {
  const container = document.getElementById('people-container');
  try {
    const resp = await fetch('people.yml');
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load people.yml');
    const text = await resp.text();
    const data = jsyaml.load(text);

    container.innerHTML = data.groups.map((group, i) => {
      const isCompact = group.compact === true;

      let cards;
      if (isCompact) {
        // Circle avatar grid for compact groups (Working Group, Research)
        cards = group.members.map(m => {
          const img = `https://github.com/${m.github}.png`;
          const affiliation = m.affiliation ? m.affiliation : '';
          const tooltip = affiliation ? `${m.name} — ${affiliation}` : m.name;
          return `
            <a href="https://github.com/${m.github}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
               class="compact-avatar" title="${tooltip}">
              <img src="${img}" alt="${m.name}" loading="lazy" />
              <span class="compact-name">${m.name.split(' ')[0]}</span>
            </a>`;
        }).join('');
      } else {
        // Full card layout for core groups
        cards = group.members.map(m => {
          const img = `https://github.com/${m.github}.png`;
          const role = m.role ? `<div class="team-role">${m.role}</div>` : '';
          const affiliation = m.affiliation ? `<div class="team-affiliation">${m.affiliation}</div>` : '';
          const bio = m.bio ? `<p class="team-bio">${m.bio}</p>` : '';
          return `
            <div class="team-card">
              <img src="${img}" alt="${m.name}" loading="lazy" />
              <h3>${m.name}</h3>
              ${role}${affiliation}${bio}
            </div>`;
        }).join('');
      }

      const divider = i < data.groups.length - 1
        ? '<hr class="about-divider" />'
        : '';

      const gridClass = isCompact
        ? 'compact-avatar-grid'
        : 'team-grid team-grid-wide';

      return `
        <div class="about-section">
          <h2 id="${group.id}">${group.name}</h2>
          <p>${group.description}</p>
          <div class="${gridClass}">
            ${cards}
          </div>
        </div>
        ${divider}`;
    }).join('');
  } catch(e) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: var(--ab-text-muted); text-align: center;">Could not load team data. <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book">View on GitHub</a>.</p>';
  }
})();
</script>
```

:::
